title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
